title: 16 to 19 funding: in-year growth for 2025 to 2026
body: "August 2025  Each year, we review the early data returns from institutions delivering 16 to 19 education (including up to age 24 for those with high needs) and award in-year growth where necessary, subject to affordability.  This is our expected method for calculating in-year growth awards for academic year 2025 to 2026.  All references to R04 in this guidance mean the R04 student figure with a 1 November reference date applied. "
